title: celsia lyrata var. sinuata
intro: Celsia lyrata var. sinuata, also known as the Sino Celsia or Chinese Celosia, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the Amaranthaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Celsia lyrata var. sinuata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as a natural diuretic. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as tea, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
